name: Deep Dish Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Bake sausage in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes, then drain and set aside.
3. Squeeze the tomatoes with your hands or a fork to remove all the juice.
4. Mix the seasonings into the squeezed tomatoes.
5. Spread shredded mozzarella evenly on the dough.
6. Place pieces of sausage over the cheese.
7. Place the tomato mixture on top of the sausage.
8. Sprinkle additional oregano on top.
9. Prepare the dough: Dissolve yeast in warm water, then mix flour, olive oil, and salt with the yeast solution.
10. Knead the dough for 5 minutes, cover, and let it rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
11. Divide the dough into two pieces and place each piece in lightly oiled pans.
12. Spread the dough with your fingers around the bottom and part of the sides of the pans.
13. If the dough tears, pinch together the edges.
14. Place the toppings on the dough.
15. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 15 minutes on the bottom rack of the oven (gas) or second rung from the heating element (electric).
